verse_text: A wife is bound by law as long as her husband lives; but if her husband dies, she is at liberty to be married to whom she wishes, only in the Lord.

links.context: Judith maintained her widowhood until the end of her life, a common practice in Israel ([[LUK.2:36]], [[LUK.2:37]]) and in the Church ([[1CO.7:8]], [[1CO.7:39]], [[1CO.7:40]]; [[1TI.5:5]]). The phrase was buried with his people is indicative of the Hebrew practice of burying succeeding generations of the family in a common grave site ([[GEN.49:29]]).
